arts.ttl: Man City 'earmark' Premier League full-back as Kyle Walker replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly eyeing Nottingham Forest defender Ola Aina as a potential replacement for veteran right-back Kyle Walker in 2025.

arts.ttl: Leicester looking to bring 30-year-old defender back to the Premier League
arts.sum: Leicester City are looking to improve their defensive options, and they have identified Chancel Mbemba as a target. According to Africa Foot, the 30-year-old Marseille defender is on their radar, and it will be interesting to see if the Foxes can get a deal done. Mbemba has fallen down the pecking order at the French […] The post Leicester looking to bring 30-year-old defender back to the Premier League appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Manchester City as Ruud van Nistelrooy makes two changes
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Stolarczyk; Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, Mavididi; Vardy. Meanwhile, Buonanotte makes his first start in five matches under Ruud van Nistelrooy, coming in for the suspended Jordan Ayew on the right wing.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola Reaches Manchester City Milestone vs. Leicester
arts.sum: The 53-year-old will become only the second person to preside over 500 matches as Manchester City manager.
